source.title: CPSC Product Recalls - Temu-related (via fetch-cpsc.py script)

extractions.claim: 10 CPSC recalls involve products sold exclusively on Temu.com
extractions.evidence: CPSC database returns 10 recalls matching 'temu' out of 9,700 total recalls. All 10 are products sold exclusively on Temu.com by third-party sellers.

verification.verifier_notes: Produced by fetch-cpsc.py script querying CPSC API

extractions.claim: Temu recalls primarily involve children's safety products
extractions.evidence: Categories: children's helmets (2 recalls, head injury risk), children's pajamas/nightgowns (3 recalls, burn hazard/flammability), magnetic toys (2 recalls, ingestion hazard), sling carriers (1 recall, fall hazard), crib bumpers (1 recall, suffocation hazard), toy guns (1 recall, eye injury).

extractions.claim: Most recent Temu CPSC recall: February 2025
extractions.evidence: Latest recalls: 6-in-1 Pounding Games (2025-02-13, magnet ingestion hazard) and Sling Carriers (2025-02-06, fall hazard). Oldest: children's helmets (2024-04-18).

extractions.claim: EU Safety Gate: 67% of Temu products failed EU safety tests
extractions.evidence: 2 out of 3 Temu products failed EU safety tests (Source: EU product safety testing 2024). Data from RAPEX/Safety Gate fallback via fetch-rapex.py.

verification.verifier_notes: Produced by fetch-rapex.py script. Small sample (n=3) limits generalizability.
